▸ **toJS**(`tree`, `options?`): `void`

Rename and transpile any new typescript files created to javascript files

#### Parameters

| Name | Type |
| :------ | :------ |
| `tree` | [`Tree`](/docs/reference/devkit/Tree) |
| `options?` | [`ToJSOptions`](/docs/reference/devkit/ToJSOptions) |

#### Returns

`void`
